phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the city map
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger un mapa de la ciudad?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh poo-EH-doh reh-koh-HEHR oon MAH-pah deh lah syoo-DAHD?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador principal, frente a usted.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
likely_response.translation_en: At the main counter, in front of you.

responses.english: At the main counter, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
responses.local: En el mostrador principal, frente a usted.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay alguien que hable inglés aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, eye ahl-GYEHN keh OH-bleh een-GLEHS ah-KEE?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is staff available in English.

responses.english: Yes, there is staff available in English.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided routes are running today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay rutas guiadas funcionando hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿ah-ee ROO-tahs gee-AH-dahs foon-see-oh-NAHN-doh OH-ee?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the schedule board.

responses.english: It is indicated on the schedule board.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the hotel desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de hoteles?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh oh-TEH-les?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, segunda puerta a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh seh-GOON-dah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, second door on the right.

responses.english: At the back, second door on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh seh-GOON-dah poo-EHR-tah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Al fondo, segunda puerta a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a guided route
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo reservar una ruta guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh PWEH-doh reh-sehr-BAHR OO-nah ROO-tah gee-AH-dah?

likely_response.local: Rellene este formulario y pague en caja.
likely_response.pronunciation: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: Fill out this form and pay at the cashier.

responses.english: Fill out this form and pay at the cashier.
responses.phonetic: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y pah-G-eh EHN KAH-hah
responses.local: Rellene este formulario y pague en caja.
